# Pagination

Marker- and offset-paginated list operations return an `Iterable` that threads
the cursor for you — the list method *is* the paginator, so you loop it directly
with an enhanced `for`:

```java
for (var item : client.folders.listItems(folderId, null)) {
// use item
}
```

Pass an options object (or `null`) as the final argument. The paginator stops
when the last page is reached. It is re-iterable: each `iterator()` runs an
independent pass over a private copy of your options, so your options object is
never mutated.
